cards.title: Partner's mother concerns before having children
cards.body: A reader worries about her partner's cruel mother's influence on their future children. An advice columnist recommends minimizing contact unless she changes significantly.

cards.title: Affordable childcare crucial for families
cards.body: The government is investing billions to help families with childcare costs. Officials warn against profiteers limiting the benefits families should receive.

cards.title: Modern parenting challenges explained
cards.body: Many childhood mental health challenges may be predictable responses to changes in modern family life. Ancient parenting practices offer valuable lessons for today's parents.

cards.title: Brain synchronization benefits family bonding
cards.body: Family members who engage without electronic devices experience better brain synchronization and improved socioemotional health. Disconnecting from screens strengthens bonds between parents and children.

cards.title: Helping children feel they matter
cards.body: The feeling of mattering leads to better academic and social performance in children. It also protects against negative behaviors and suicidal thoughts.

cards.title: Autism diagnosis: A healing journey
cards.body: Coming to terms with an autism diagnosis is a gradual process of healing and recovery. Early feelings about diagnosis do not determine long-term outcomes.
